item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the feedback Lucy, I really appreciate it! I agree with you and I rewrote the dialogue in that section to try and allude heavily to that point without having him outright say it. Hopefully it feels a bit more natural now.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: i like it! my only criticism would be that, when the D-class is talking about how Dr. Taylor is replaceable, the language he uses is a little too on-the-nose. like him saying "authoritarianism often disguises itself as a collective benefit". I get that's the point you're trying to make, but stating it outright seems a little cheap. otherwise, nice entry. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This was a great read! +1 Definitely a good tone throughout and it shows you what you mean to do there.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks, I really appreciate it and I'm glad you liked it! And upon looking it over again, I agree with you. I removed a good chunk of them so it's not repeated as often. Thanks for the suggestion!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Gods, this is fantastic. So many layers of meaning and metaphor and subtlety packed into this that I can't help but reread. Easy +1.

Bit of a suggestion, though, Dr. Taylor repeats the name "David" almost every other sentence and it gets fairly tedious to read.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I loved this SCP! It has just enough being explained to you right away, so that it is easily understood and read, but enough mystery around what happened during the recording to keep you entertained with the article for a while after you’re finished with it. The dialogue was what really sold it to me though. You could really see the researcher get more and more uneasy and hesitant as the interviews went on. Overall, very nice job Treneff! I hope to see more of your works in the future!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This sounded really good!! The image you created was very intriguing and really what got me to read it. I wish I knew more about this weird DVD and the movie! ::)

item.title: Second Attempt!
item.content:encoded:
Alright everyone, here is my second attempt at my first SCP. I had some glaringly obvious formating issues I missed the first time around somehow, but fixed it and hopefully this time it will all stick.

Thanks again to cybersqyd, Kybard, F15H35 and torcsandantlers for their feedback. It was greatly appreciated and I wouldn't have been able to do it without their help.

Also I created the DVD image myself with the hallway image being sourced here, from this provider.

Thanks everyone!
